youtube_items.summary: Hello, I'm Andrew Freriedman, director and senior fellow of the human rights initiative here at CSIS. And along with my colleague Anne Frederick, in honor of this International Human Rights Day, we want to talk about the important origins of this day and the state of human rights, freedom, and democracy in the world. And >> today on International Human Rights Day, we do not celebrate because we've succeeded in protecting all human beings and human rights worldwide. We know this isn't the case and we know this goal hasn't been achieved at any point in history even when the United Nations first established the Universal Declaration of Human Rights in 1948. International Human Rights Day is however a celebration that across the globe there's an ongoing fight to realize the goals of the
